zh.lifeSummary: 當Ludwig von OETTINGEN V於大約1240年出生在德國時，他的父親Ludwig III von Oettingen41歲，母親Adelheid Von Hirschberg27歲。他於1263年7月28日之前與Maria von Hohenzollern Nürnberg結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1313年11月9日享年74歲，埋葬在德國巴登-爾特波格奧斯塔爾布可萊斯吉海姆 阿姆 里斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ludwig von OETTINGEN V于大约1240年出生在德国时，他的父亲Ludwig III von Oettingen41岁，母亲Adelheid Von Hirschberg27岁。他于1263年7月28日之前与Maria von Hohenzollern Nürnberg结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1313年11月9日享年74岁，埋葬在德国巴登-爾特波格奧斯塔爾布可萊斯吉海姆 阿姆 里斯。

nameMeanings.name: OETTINGEN
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hanni, Christoph, Siegbert.
German (also Öttinger): habitational name for someone from a place in Bavaria called Oettingen or a place in Lorraine (France) called Öttingen (French Ottange). Compare Ottinger and Ettinger .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Ettinger  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Ottinger
meanings: German (also Öttinger): habitational name for someone from any of the places called Otting or Öttingen, in Swabia, Bavaria, and Lorraine (France). Compare Oettinger .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Ettinger  , a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Ludwig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from hlud ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’; an ancient royal and imperial name. See Louis .

variants.name: Louis
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Ronald .  It is sometimes used as a given name in its own right.

variants.name: Ronald
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Rögnvaldr (composed of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’). This name was regularly used in the Middle Ages in northern England and Scotland, where Scandinavian influence was strong. It is now widespread throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Ludwig von OETTINGEN V was born about 1240, in Germany, his father, Ludwig III von Oettingen, was 41 and his mother, Adelheid Von Hirschberg, was 27. He married Maria von Hohenzollern Nürnberg before 28 July 1263. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 9 November 1313, at the age of 74, and was buried in Kirchheim am Ries, Ostalbkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ludwig von OETTINGEN V est né environ 1240, à Allemagne, son père, Ludwig III von Oettingen, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Adelheid Von Hirschberg, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Maria von Hohenzollern Nürnberg avant 28 juillet 1263. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 9 novembre 1313, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Kirchheim am Ries, Ostalbkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ludwig von OETTINGEN V um 1240 in Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ludwig III von Oettingen 41 und seine Mutter Adelheid Von Hirschberg 27. Er hat vor 28. Juli 1263 Maria von Hohenzollern Nürnberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 9. November 1313 im Alter von 74 Jahren und wurde in Kirchheim am Ries, Ostalbkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ludwig von OETTINGEN V è nato il circa 1240 nel Germania, il suo padre, Ludwig III von Oettingen, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid Von Hirschberg, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Maria von Hohenzollern Nürnberg prima del 28 luglio 1263. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 9 novembre 1313, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Kirchheim am Ries, Ostalbkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Ludwig von OETTINGEN Vが約1240年にドイツで生まれた時，父Ludwig III von Oettingenは41歳，母Adelheid Von Hirschbergは27歳であった。1263年7月28日以前にMaria von Hohenzollern Nürnbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1313年11月9日に74歳で死去し，ドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグオスタルブクレイスキルチヘイム アム リーズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ludwig von OETTINGEN V(이)가 대략 1240년 독일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ludwig III von Oettingen(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid Von Hirschberg(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1263년 7월 28일 이전 Maria von Hohenzollern Nürnberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1313년 11월 9일 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 바데-wu르테버그 오스탤브크레이스 커ch하임 아 리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ludwig von OETTINGEN V nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Alemanha, seu pai, Ludwig III von Oettingen, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid Von Hirschberg, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Maria von Hohenzollern Nürnberg antes 28 de julho de 1263. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de novembro de 1313, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Kirchheim am Ries, Ostalbkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ludwig von OETTINGEN V родился около 1240 г. в местности Германия, его отцу по имени Ludwig III von Oettingen было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Adelheid Von Hirschberg, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria von Hohenzollern Nürnberg перед 28 июля 1263 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 9 ноября 1313 г. в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности кирчхим ам риесь, осталбкрис, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ludwig von OETTINGEN V nació aproximadamente 1240, en Alemania, su papá, Ludwig III von Oettingen, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Adelheid Von Hirschberg, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Maria von Hohenzollern Nürnberg antes de 28 de julio de 1263. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 9 de noviembre de 1313, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Kirchheim am Ries, Ostalbkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania.
